message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.svdvals wrapper parity (franken_numpy-0nzo)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.linalg.svdvals(x). Test covers
2x2 diagonal (singular values are |diag|), 3x4 wide returning 3
values (min(M,N)), 4x3 tall, identity matrix → all-ones, singular
matrix, equivalence to svd(x)[1], and 3-D batched input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
